roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL PRELIMINARY HEARING AND MOTION TO DETAIN/LD 10-06-21/INTC/X THE PEOPLE'S ORAL MOTION TO AMEND THE COMPLAINT TO ADD COUNT 004, 459PC,2ND DEGREE,A MISDEMEANOR, IS GRANTED,/FAWC/IRRC/  /TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST &CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF NL/DEFT ADV NL:004/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/

/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDPX: 10-06-21/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED AFTER A COORDINATED PICK-UP WITH SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS IS IN PLACE,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/SA2: 20 VILLA TERRACE, SF/SAORD4: 150 YARDS/SAORD4/CONTD: PRELIMINARY HEARING AND HEARING ON PEOPLE'S MOTION TO DETAIN/DOP/
